chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-1064 of 2021. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 09.09.2022. Mr. Farhad Ali Abro advocate for the applicant. Mr. Muhammad Hassan Chang advocate for complainant. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. Applicant is present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. ORDER MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- On a dispute over a plot applicant is alleged to have caused Chhuri/knife blows to complainant in front of Quetta Sadaat Hotel near Sabzi Mandi Hyderabad on 01.09.2021, reported on 14.10.2021 to police, causing him five injuries, all bailable except injury No.2, opined to fall within the purview of Section 337-F(ii), non-bailable and punishable for five years. Bail of applicant has been dismissed by learned trial Court only on the ground that Section 324 PPC is applicable. Both the counsel have informed that entire case has proceeded and now fixed for statement of accused under Section 342 Cr.P.C. In view thereof they have consented to confirmation of bail however without any observation on merits of case and leaving learned trial Court to decide the case within a period of one month. Accordingly, this bail application is allowed and ad-interim pre- arrest bail granted to the applicant vide order 22.11.2021 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Learned trial Court is directed to conclude the case within a period of one month and announce judgment. JUDGE Irfan Ali
